basicInfo.name: Silvesta
basicInfo.flavor: Cursed by Dellons and Mercure after their sudden appearance, he fell into complete chaos, losing his memory. But he never forgot his sense of justice and was determined to save the world from Pascal's rampage.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 145% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Condemnation
Skill 1.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 95% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Deals Piercing, Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 95% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: Pierce

Skill 2.name: Purifying Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 62% of Magic Attack plus 7% of the target's Max HP 2 time(s). (HP-based damage limited to 75% of caster's Attack.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 75% of Magic Attack plus 9% of the target's Max HP.

Passive.name: Knight's Will
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Blessing. [Always Active]
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 135% of the caster's Magic Attack upon triggering Guts. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Incoming Healing Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants All Debuff Removal (Crowd Control) upon being inflicted with Crowd Control.
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity when a debuff is removed. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
 - Grants 1 stack(s) of Magic Attack Boost when a debuff is removed. [Max 4 Stack(s)]
 - Heals HP equal to 96% of the caster's Magic Attack upon using a skill 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: 1 stack(s) of 10% Magic Attack Boost when a debuff is removed. [Max 4 Stack(s)]

Awaken Skill.name: Purifying Darkness
Awaken Skill.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict 2 Buff Removal(s).
 - Self
 - Grants Skill Cooldown Reset.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: Resets all skill cooldowns.

profile.story: Cursed by Dellons and Mercure after their sudden appearance, he fell into complete chaos, losing his memory. But he never forgot his sense of justice and was determined to save the world from Pascal's rampage.

basicInfo.name: Silvesta
basicInfo.flavor: After Silvesta collected the shards to form the Stone of Destruction, he tried to purify the evil that the power holds, but failed. The Power of Destruction was released, the world turned to chaos, and war broke out. Silvesta lived in isolation for a long time due to guilt.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Condemnation
Skill 1.desc:
Self
 - Grants Life Drain. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 72% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Life Drain to 24%.
 - Increases Damage: To 85% of Magic Attack.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Skill 2.name: Purifying Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 60% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 75% of Magic Attack.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 40% of Defense.

Passive.name: Knight's Will
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Blessing. [Always Active]
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Blessing cap becomes 25% of Max HP.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Grants All Debuff Removal upon triggering Guts.
 - Adds Healing: Heals HP equal to 100% of Max HP upon triggering Guts.

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.story: After Silvesta collected the shards to form the Stone of Destruction, he tried to purify the evil that the power holds, but failed. The Power of Destruction was released, the world turned to chaos, and war broke out. Silvesta lived in isolation for a long time due to guilt.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Condemnation
Skill 1.desc:
Self
 - 3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 150% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Heals HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).

Skill 2.name: Purifying Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack deals additional Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 200% of Magic Attack while [All Damage Immunity] is active.
 - Heals HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Knight's Will
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Blessing. [Always Active]
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
 - Heals HP equal to 100% of Max HP upon triggering Guts.
 - Grants All Damage Immunity when HP falls to or below 75%, 50%, or 25%. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Skill Cooldown Reset when HP falls to or below 75%, 50%, or 25%.

basicInfo.name: Silvesta
basicInfo.flavor: While in the palace library, Silvesta discovered a mysterious power described in a book that closely resembled his own. Intrigued, he resigned from his duties as a knight and embarked on an adventure to uncover the secrets of the Power of Destruction.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Condemnation
Skill 1.desc:
Self
 - Grants Life Drain. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 65% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.

Skill 2.name: Purifying Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 55% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 55% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Knight's Will
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Blessing. [Always Active]
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]

basicInfo.name: Silvesta
basicInfo.flavor: A long time ago, Silvesta was the most famous Knight of Light in Terra Kingdom. His combat prowess and fierce sense of justice earned him the trust of his people.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

 - 3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - Activates again up to 1 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.

 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Knight's Will

Self

 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
